mapper.select:
SELECT t.ID AS id, t.QUOTA_CODE AS quotaCode, t.PROJECT_NAME AS projectName, t.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, t.UNIT AS unit, t.AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX AS amount, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA t WHERE 1=1
AND t.QUOTA_CODE LIKE '%' || #{quotaCode} || '%'
AND t.PROJECT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{projectName} || '%'
ORDER BY t.CREATE_TIME DESC, t.ID DESC

SELECT t.ID AS id, t.QUOTA_CODE AS quotaCode, t.PROJECT_NAME AS projectName, t.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, t.UNIT AS unit, t.AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX AS amount, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA t WHERE t.ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA SET PROJECT_NAME = #{projectName}, PROJECT_CONTENT = #{projectContent}, UNIT = #{unit}, AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX = #{amount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(t.QUOTA_CODE) FROM E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA t WHERE t.QUOTA_CODE LIKE ('DE-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '-%')
